children.name: ParseCommand
children.purpose: Validate and parse the command string to determine the operation type.
children.behavior: Check command is one of 'place', 'cancel', 'track'. Return parsed command type or error.

acceptance_criteria.description: ParseCommand returns 'place', 'cancel', or 'track' for valid input, or error for invalid input.

children.name: PlaceOrder
children.purpose: Execute the full place order workflow: validate items, charge payment, reserve inventory, create order, send notification.
children.behavior: Sequentially validate items stock, charge payment, reserve inventory, create order record, send confirmation. On any failure, rollback previous steps.
children.signature: def PlaceOrder(order_data: dict, orders: Database, inventory: Database) -> dict

constraints.description: Must rollback all writes if any step fails.

acceptance_criteria.description: Order created with status 'confirmed' on success.
On failure, no partial writes remain.

children.name: CancelOrder
children.purpose: Execute the cancel order workflow: verify order exists and not shipped, refund payment, restore inventory, update order status.
children.behavior: Check order exists and status allows cancellation, refund payment, restore reserved inventory, update order status to cancelled. Rollback on failure.
children.signature: def CancelOrder(order_data: dict, orders: Database, inventory: Database) -> dict

constraints.description: Must not cancel if order status is 'shipped'.
Must rollback all writes if any step fails.

acceptance_criteria.description: Order status updated to 'cancelled' on success.
On failure, no partial writes remain.

children.name: TrackOrder
children.purpose: Return current order status and estimated delivery time.
children.behavior: Look up order by order_id, retrieve status and estimated delivery, return result.
children.signature: def TrackOrder(order_data: dict, orders: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read order status and delivery info

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns order status and estimated delivery time for valid order_id.

governance_notes: Parent global_vars conservation verified: orders (read_write) covered by PlaceOrder (write), CancelOrder (write), TrackOrder (read). inventory (read_write) covered by PlaceOrder (write), CancelOrder (write). payments (read_write) covered by PlaceOrder (write), CancelOrder (write). No parent operation dropped.
